components.value: V, S, M (a pinch of wool or similar substance) V, S

range.value: close (25 ft. + 5 ft./2 levels) medium (100 ft. + 10 ft./level)

area.value: one humanoid creature of 4 HD or less

description.value: This spell clouds the mind of a humanoid creature with 4 or fewer Hit Dice so that it takes no actions. Humanoids of 5 or more HD are not affected. A dazed subject is not stunned, so attackers get no special advantage against it. After a creature has been dazed by this spell, it is immune to the effects of this spell for 1 minute. Dazed Condition: The creature is unable to act normally. A dazed creature can take no actions, but has no penalty to AC. Daze, Mass This spell functions as daze, except as noted above.
